description: As a sold-out event ends, the operations center must manage the flow of vehicle and pedestrian traffic leaving the venue.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with local police to manage traffic signals at key intersections near the venue.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent communicates with police to prioritize traffic leaving the venue's parking lots.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch parking attendants and security to direct traffic within the parking lots.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends staff to all major parking areas to direct drivers.

nodes.task_description: Use digital signage on nearby roadways to direct drivers to the least congested routes.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates digital signs with real-time traffic advice.

nodes.task_description: Monitor CCTV feeds of parking lots and roadways to identify and resolve any bottlenecks.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent watches the cameras and re-deploys staff as needed to keep traffic moving.
